name: lineage-tracking
description: Model creates documents with lineage tracking - tracing document provenance through read->create chains

steps.name: First Document Creation
steps.description: Create an initial source document with specific content

params.title: Q1 2026 Engineering Report - Source
paragraphs: This document contains Q1 2026 engineering progress data. It serves as the source document for lineage tracking tests.
The engineering team completed 94% of planned commitments this quarter.
Key achievements include API v3 launch, platform reliability improvements, and mobile SDK beta.

steps.name: Read Source Document
steps.description: Read the source document to record it in lineage tracking

steps.name: Second Document Creation
steps.description: Create a derivative document based on the source document

params.title: Q1 2026 Engineering Summary - Derived
paragraphs: This document is derived from the Q1 2026 Engineering Report - Source. It provides a high-level summary of key achievements.
1. API v3 Public Launch - Completed February 18th
2. Platform Reliability Initiative - Completed ahead of schedule
3. Mobile SDK Beta Launch - Launched March 10th
4. Team Growth - 48 engineers across three offices

steps.name: Third Document Creation
steps.description: Create another derivative document based on the derived document

params.title: Q1 2026 Executive Summary - Final
paragraphs: This document is derived from the Q1 2026 Engineering Summary - Derived. It provides an executive-level overview.
Engineering delivered 94% of Q1 commitments with three major milestones completed ahead of schedule.

steps.name: Read Executive Summary
steps.description: Read the executive summary to record it in lineage tracking

steps.name: Trace Lineage from Executive Summary
steps.description: Use lineage-tool to trace the provenance chain for the executive summary document

steps.name: Trace Lineage from Source Document
steps.description: Use lineage-tool to verify the source document has derivatives

steps.name: Verify Lineage Chain
steps.description: Verify the complete lineage chain is correctly tracked
